title: Potion Effect Icons
description: Gives potions unique icons to distinguish them in the GUI
body:
This resource pack gives all vanilla potions effect icons to make them more distingishable in the GUI. Icons for potions include the effect type and the effect modifier (extended time or level 2).

The ominous bottle amplifier is also displayed on ominous bottles.

![Display of all effect icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmg1TGcn/images/0266d0f7144ef2aae267d9943480c65a4122957d.png)

First showcased in slicedlime's techincal updates video for 25w03a
